capability_seeds.description: Summarize a requirement, PRD, or spec into key points.
example_messages: Give me the main points from this requirement doc.

initial_slots.name: document_source
initial_slots.description: The document or pasted content to summarize.

capability_seeds.description: Analyze a requirement and identify major risks or gaps.
example_messages: What are the main risks in this requirement?
Review this spec and list the biggest issues.

initial_slots.name: risk_focus_area
initial_slots.description: Optional focus such as timeline, scope, dependencies, or compliance.
